description: update the README file with project context, including project introduction, installation instructions, usage examples, and contribution guidelines. 
# applyTo: ' update the README file with project context, including project introduction, installation instructions, usage examples, and contribution guidelines.' # when provided, instructions will automatically be added to the request context when the pattern matches an attached file
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-instructions in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

When making changes to the code, also update the README file with project context, including project introduction, installation instructions, usage examples, and contribution guidelines. This will help other developers understand the purpose of the project and how to use it effectively.
Also checks content of README file for obsolete information and update it accordingly. This ensures that the README file remains accurate and up-to-date, providing valuable information to users and contributors.
